message:
fix: clean up stale shutdown sentinel when PID is dead (gas-jsrl)

After SIGKILL or crash, the shutdown sentinel's defer never runs,
leaving a stale file that blocks ensureDaemon from starting. Now
reads the PID from the sentinel and checks if it's alive before
blocking — removes stale sentinels automatically.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
